---
title: "Pluck cleaning"
format: html
author: Savannah Kjaer
date: 03-09-2026
---

### load packages
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(here)
```

### read in data
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#read in files from Box
mass <- read_excel("/Users/lter/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/ARC LTER 7 (Terrestrial)/Plucks/Pluck 2024/Data/Aboveground/Shoot_data_collection_mass_ID.xlsx")
#74 obs, 141 variables
head(mass)
```

### tidy columns and rows
```{r, message=FALSE}
colnames(mass)
# drop columns we don't want
mass1 <- select(mass, -c("Date_collected","Date_sorted","Plucker","Balance","Weigher","Notes"))
#74 obs, 135 variables

# drop empty rows at the bottom
mass2 <- mass1[-c(73:74),]
#72 obs of 135 variables
```
